Name: FMovieSceneSpawnable
Description: MovieSceneSpawnable describes an object that can be spawned for this MovieScene

Variables.Name: Guid
Variables.Description: Unique identifier of the spawnable object.

Variables.Name: ChildPossessables
Variables.Description: Set of GUIDs to possessable object bindings that are bound to an object inside this spawnable

Variables.Name: Ownership
Variables.Description: Property indicating where ownership responsibility for this object lies
